title: Six Blades of Balance
description: A plugin that adds 6 new blades 3 that are cursed and 3 that are blessed each with their own powers
body:
# **Six Blades Of Balance**
**Note: Crafting receipes are in gallery**
## **Blessed Blades**

### **Grace Blade**

__A defensive powerhouse, the Grace Blade permanently grants its wielder Strength I just by holding it.__ Its primary ability __(Right-Click)__ provides complete invulnerability for 5 seconds, perfect for surviving lethal attacks. Its secondary ability __(Shift+Right-Click)__ is a swift dash that also grants a burst of Strength II for 4 seconds, allowing for quick engagements or escapes. Additionally, __every strike has a 10% chance to blind the enemy, leaving them disoriented.__

### Blazing Blade
__Forged in fire, this blade comes with Fire Aspect II__ and grants the user permanent Fire Resistance. Its primary attack __(Right-Click)__ launches a devastating Ghast fireball. The secondary ability __(Shift+Right-Click)__ triggers a massive fiery explosion around the user that damages and ignites nearby enemies without harming the wielder. As a final chaotic touch, __every hit has a 10% chance to spawn temporary lava directly at the target's feet.__

### Harmony Blade
__A weapon of overwhelming natural force, possessing this blade grants permanent Strength II.__ It features two "primed" abilities that activate on your next melee hit: __Right-Clicking __primes a Root attack that freezes the target in place for 4 seconds, while __Shift+Right-Clicking__ primes a devastating Lightning Strike that deals 4 hearts of armor-ignoring damage and traps the target inside a newly spawned tree. __It also carries a passive 10% chance to blind enemies for 5 seconds on any standard hit.__


## Cursed Blades

### Reaper Blade
__A simple yet brutal tool of death, constantly fueling its master with Strength II__. Its  ability __(Shift+Right-Click) primes your next attack to inflict severe Hunger for 6 seconds, rapidly draining the opponent's saturation. In prolonged combat, __it overwhelms foes with a 10% chance on every hit to summon two zombies directly behind the target to aid you in battle.__

### Bone Blade
__This necromantic weapon grants permanent Strength II__ and specializes in overwhelming opponents with undead minions, __boasting a massive 30% chance to summon a skeleton on every single hit.__ Its ability __(Shift+Right-Click)__ is a powerful combat buff, granting the user Strength II and Resistance for 5 seconds, while simultaneously priming their next attack __to inflict Hunger on the enemy.__

### Bloodlust Blade
__A high-risk, high-reward weapon that grants permanent Strength II.__ Its primary ability __(Right-Click)__ primes your next hit to inflict vicious Poison for 5 seconds. Its secondary ability __(Shift+Right-Click)__ is a deadly gamble: you instantly sacrifice 2 hearts of your own health to empower your NEXT devastating strike with an additional 4 hearts (8 HP) of raw damage.

# Resource Pack
Each of these swords have their own model if you want the models that I got then this is the link of the resource pack. credits to Blades of Majestica for the models!  **also dont forget to unzip the folder.**
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1GeAi8ZSSSYP_zrgRriKvBOVCNzjuUAmB/view?usp=sharing
